```ruby
def solve(grid, k)
   m = grid.size
   n = grid[0].size
   count = 0
   for i in 0...m
      for j in 0...n
         if grid[i][j] > 0
            sum = 0
            queue = [[i, j]]
            grid[i][j] = 0
            sum += grid[i][j]
            while !queue.empty?
               x, y = queue.shift
               directions = [[-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1]]
               directions.each do |dx, dy|
                  nx = x + dx
                  ny = y + dy
                  if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n
                     if grid[nx][ny] > 0
                        grid[nx][ny] = 0
                        sum += grid[nx][ny]
                        queue << [nx, ny]
                     end
                  end
               end
            end
            if sum % k == 0
               count += 1
            end
         end
      end
   end
   count
end
